prompt: A software company wants to sponsor our R-Ladies meetup and, in exchange, give a talk about their paid analytics product. Can we accept?
assertions: Says no — speakers cannot give talks about paid products/services (even if they don't work for the vendor)
Says chapters/events may not be used as a commercial vehicle / no commercial agenda
Says sponsorship is OK only as venue, food, or supplies
Notes public R-Ladies events are free to participants
Mentions R-Ladies' independence (no permanent ties that dictate decisions)
Frames the decision against the mission/rules
